ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michele McGill, via Zoom, for James Tyree, and Carole Miles; Co-Administrators.

Counsel confirms receipt of a letter from the credit union confirming that a custodial account has been opened for the minor and that the minors' mother is committed to keeping the money in that account until the minor turns eighteen (18).

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
